title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map got fresher
gist.blurb: The API field guide has been regenerated from the latest production OpenAPI spec. Fewer mysteries, fewer tabs, marginally happier bees.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference reflects the latest deployed endpoints and schema changes.
gist.impact: Developers can use the refreshed API reference to find current request and response details without reverse-engineering the live API.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a careful librarian or cartographer updating a large API field guide beside a cozy retro terminal; the book contains simple endpoint paths and is surrounded by sprouting code-plants, representing documentation synchronized with the live system.
gist.image_prompt: Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped pixel bee with pink cheek blush and light blue wings, wears tiny librarian glasses while updating a large glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal, with code-plants and small flowers growing around it. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, subtle CRT glow, pixel-font text: 'API DOCS', retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
